mapper.select: select testdataid, system, sourcedb, targetdb, phase, apply_type, new_orderid, jobid, idtype, custid, custid_new, cust_nm, ssn, new_jobid, status, DATE_FORMAT(approve_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as approve_date, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, disposal_status, DATE_FORMAT(disposal_sche_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as disposal_sche_date, DATE_FORMAT(disposal_exec_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as disposal_exec_date from cotdl.tbl_testdata a where 1=1 order by testdataid desc

select testdataid, system, sourcedb, targetdb, phase, apply_type, new_orderid, jobid, idtype, custid, custid_new, cust_nm, ssn, new_jobid, status, DATE_FORMAT(approve_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as approve_date, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, disposal_status, DATE_FORMAT(disposal_sche_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as disposal_sche_date, DATE_FORMAT(disposal_exec_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as disposal_exec_date from cotdl.tbl_testdata a where DATE_FORMAT(disposal_sche_date, '%Y/%m/%d') <= #{basedate} and a.status = 'Ended OK' and a.disposal_exec_date is null order by testdataid
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_testdata (testdataid, system, sourcedb, targetdb, phase, apply_type, new_orderid, jobid, idtype, custid, custid_new, cust_nm, ssn, new_jobid, status, approve_date, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{testdataid}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourcedb, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetdb, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{apply_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_orderid}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custid_new, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ssn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{approve_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select COALESCE(max(testdataid),10000)+1 from cotdl.tbl_testdata
insert into COTDL.tbl_testdata (testdataid, system, sourcedb, targetdb, phase, apply_type, new_orderid, jobid, idtype, custid, custid_new, cust_nm, ssn, new_jobid, status, approve_date, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{testdataid}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourcedb, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetdb, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{apply_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_orderid}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custid_new, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ssn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{approve_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_testdata set phase = 'APPROVING', status = 'APPLY', upddate = NOW() where testdataid = #{testdataid}
update cotdl.tbl_testdata set phase = 'REJECTED', status = 'REJECTED', upddate = NOW() where testdataid = #{testdataid}

update cotdl.tbl_testdata set phase = 'APPROVED', status = 'ORDERED', upddate = NOW(), disposal_sche_date = DATE_ADD(NOW() , INTERVAL ( SELECT DEL_DEADLINE FROM cotdl.tbl_piipolicy tp WHERE POLICY_ID = 'PII_TESTDATA' AND PHASE = 'CHECKIN' AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY VERSION DESC LIMIT 1 ) DAY) where testdataid= #{testdataid}
mapper.select: select testdataid, system, sourcedb, targetdb, phase, apply_type, new_orderid, jobid, idtype, custid, custid_new, cust_nm, ssn, new_jobid, status, DATE_FORMAT(approve_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as approve_date, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, disposal_status, DATE_FORMAT(disposal_sche_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as disposal_sche_date, DATE_FORMAT(disposal_exec_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as disposal_exec_date from cotdl.tbl_testdata where testdataid= #{testdataid}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_testdata set new_orderid = #{new_orderid}, status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate = NOW(), upduserid = #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where testdataid = #{testdataid}

update cotdl.tbl_testdata set new_orderid = #{new_orderid}, status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate = NOW(), approve_date = NOW(), upduserid = #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where testdataid= #{testdataid}
update cotdl.tbl_testdata set status = 'DISPOSED', disposal_status = 'Y', disposal_exec_date = NOW() where testdataid= #{testdataid}
update cotdl.tbl_testdata set status = (select status from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where orderid= #{new_orderid}) where new_orderid = #{new_orderid}
update cotdl.tbl_testdata set custid_new = #{custid_new, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) where new_orderid = #{new_orderid}
mapper.select: select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_testdata a INNER JOIN ( SELECT jobid, requesterid, requestername FROM cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq WHERE approvalid = 'TESTDATA_APPROVAL' AND reqid IN ( SELECT MAX(reqid) FROM cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq WHERE approvalid = 'TESTDATA_APPROVAL' GROUP BY jobid ) ) b ON a.testdataid = b.jobid

select B.KEY_NAME keyid, A.KEY_NAME2 keyname, B.CUSTID custid, B.VAL1 val, B.NEWVAL1 newval from (select SUCCEDDING KEYMAPID, PK_COL KEY_NAME2 from TBL_PIIORDERSTEPTABLE where ORDERID= #{new_orderid} and STEPTYPE='GEN_KEYMAP' and PK_COL is not null and SUCCEDDING is not null group by SUCCEDDING, PK_COL) A, TBL_PIIMASTERKEYMAP B where B.ORDERID= #{new_orderid} and A.KEYMAPID = concat('KEY_',B.KEY_NAME) order by B.KEY_NAME, B.CUSTID, B.VAL1

SELECT member.DEPT_NAME AS deptname, member.USERNAME AS userName, SUM(CASE WHEN user_data.신청유형 = '자동생성' THEN user_data.총건수 ELSE 0 END) AS autoGenRequestCount, SUM(CASE WHEN user_data.신청유형 = '자동생성' THEN user_data.PII건수 ELSE 0 END) AS autoGenCustomerCount, SUM(CASE WHEN user_data.신청유형 = '테이블적재' THEN user_data.총건수 ELSE 0 END) AS tableLoadRequestCount, SUM(CASE WHEN user_data.신청유형 = '테이블적재' THEN user_data.PII건수 ELSE 0 END) AS tableLoadTableCount FROM ( -- 1. 테스트데이터 자동생성 쿼리 SELECT reguserid AS 신청자ID, '자동생성' AS 신청유형, COUNT(*) AS 총건수, SUM(LENGTH(custid) - LENGTH(REPLACE(custid, ',', '')) + 1) AS PII건수 FROM cotdl.tbl_testdata WHERE 1=1
AND regdate >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y/%m/%d')
AND regdate <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y/%m/%d')
GROUP BY reguserid UNION ALL -- 2. 테이블 단위 테스트데이터 적재 쿼리 SELECT A.JOB_OWNER_ID1 AS 신청자ID, '테이블적재' AS 신청유형, COUNT(DISTINCT B.ORDERID) AS 총건수, COUNT(B.TABLE_NAME) AS PII건수 FROM cotdl.tbl_piiorder A JOIN cotdl.tbl_piiorderstepTABLE B ON A.ORDERID = B.ORDERID WHERE A.JOBID not like 'TESTDATA_AUTO%' and (B.STEPTYPE = 'EXE_SCRAMBLE' or B.STEPTYPE = 'EXE_MIGRATE')
AND A.ORDERDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y/%m/%d')
AND A.ORDERDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y/%m/%d')
GROUP BY A.JOB_OWNER_ID1 ) AS user_data JOIN cotdl.tbl_member member ON user_data.신청자ID = member.USERID and member.USERID not like 'admin%' and member.USERID not like 'member%' and member.USERID not like 'user%' GROUP BY user_data.신청자ID, member.DEPT_NAME, member.USERNAME ORDER BY member.USERNAME
